Triggers and actions for Outseta CRM and: Auslöser und Aktionen für Outseta CRM und Abrechnung
Your full Outseta domain URL, e.g. https: Deine vollständige Outseta Domain URL, z.B. https://yourcompany.outseta.com
Found in Outseta → Settings → Integratio: Gefunden in Outseta → Einstellungen → Integrationen → API
Found alongside your API Key in Outseta: Neben Ihrem API-Schlüssel gefunden in Outseta → Einstellungen → Integrationen → API
Connect Activepieces to your Outseta acc:
Verbinden Sie Activepieces mit Ihrem Outseta-Konto mit der Admin-API.

**Um Ihre Zugangsdaten zu erhalten:**
1. Melden Sie sich bei Ihrem Outseta-Konto
2. Gehen Sie zu **Einstellungen → Integrationen → API**
3. Kopieren Sie Ihren **API Schlüssel** und **API Secret**
4. Ihre Domain ist Ihre Outseta Subdomain, z. `https://yourcompany.outseta.com`

Braucht Hilfe? Siehe [Outseta API docs](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/3613332/outseta-rest-api-v1).
Retrieve an account by its UID, or by th: Retrieve an account by its UID, or by the email of its primary contact. Returns plan, subscription, billing address, primary contact and add-on details.
Retrieve a person by email or by UID, in: Retrieve a person by email or by UID, including the linked account.
Retrieve a deal by its UID, or by the em: Retrieve a deal by its UID, or by the email of the contact associated with the deal plus the pipeline.
Retrieve a subscription by its UID, or f: Retrieve a subscription by its UID, or fetch the current subscription of an account by Account UID. Returns plan, billing terms, renewal dates, discount, and add-on details.
Retrieve the most recent payment transac: Retrieve the most recent payment transaction for an account. Returns found=false if no payment has ever been recorded.
Create a new account in Outseta CRM. Opt: Create a new account in Outseta CRM. Optionally start a subscription on a plan in the same call.
Create a new deal in the CRM.
Search for a person by email. If not fou: Suche nach einer Person per E-Mail. Wenn nicht gefunden, erstelle eine neue.
Search for a deal by contact email and p: Search for a deal by contact email and pipeline. If not found, create a new one.
Aktualisiere ein bestehendes Konto in Outseta.
Aktualisiere eine vorhandene Person in Outseta.
Delete an account from Outseta CRM.
Delete a person from Outseta CRM.
Lösche einen Deal aus dem CRM.
Retrieve a paginated list of accounts fr: Retrieve a paginated list of accounts from your Outseta CRM.
Retrieve a paginated list of persons fro: Retrieve a paginated list of persons from your Outseta CRM.
Retrieve a paginated list of deals from: Retrieve a paginated list of deals from your Outseta CRM.
Retrieve a paginated list of subscriptio: Retrieve a paginated list of subscription plans from your Outseta billing catalog.
Retrieve a paginated list of add-ons fro: Retrieve a paginated list of add-ons from your Outseta billing catalog.
Retrieve a paginated list of discount co: Retrieve a paginated list of discount coupons from your Outseta billing catalog.
Retrieve a paginated list of support tic: Retrieve a paginated list of support tickets (cases) from Outseta. Optionally filter by the person who submitted them.
Retrieve all billing transactions (payme: Retrieve all billing transactions (payments, refunds, invoices) for a given account.
Change an account's current subscription: Ändern Sie das aktuelle Abonnement eines Kontos (Upgrade, Downgraden oder wechseln Sie auf kostenlos).
Cancel the current subscription on an ac: Kündigen Sie das aktuelle Abonnement auf einem Konto. Standardmäßig läuft das Abonnement am Ende der aktuellen Laufzeit ab. Sie können auch sofort kündigen.
Remove a pending cancellation request fr: Remove a pending cancellation request from an account, keeping the subscription active.
Apply a discount coupon to the current s: Apply a discount coupon to the current subscription of an account.
Track usage for a metered (usage-based): Tracknutzung für ein erweitertes (nutzungsbasiertes) Add-on auf einem Konto.
Attach a recurring add-on to an account': Attach a recurring add-on to an account's current subscription. Different from Add Usage for Add-on, which only records consumption on a metered add-on already attached.
Extend the trial period of an account by: Extend the trial period of an account by setting a new trial end date.
Update the credit card / payment method: Update the credit card / payment method on an account. The payment processor tokens (CustomerToken, PaymentToken) must come from your payment processor (e.g. Stripe Elements) — not from Outseta.
Create a new discount coupon in the Outs: Create a new discount coupon in the Outseta billing catalog. Either AmountOff or PercentOff must be set, never both.
Create an ad-hoc invoice for an account. The invoice is linked to the account's current subscription.
Record a payment against an invoice. The: Record a payment against an invoice. The invoice is marked as paid if the total payments match the invoice amount.
Send (or resend) the invoice email to th: Send (or resend) the invoice email to the customer associated with an invoice.
Manually trigger the processing (retry): Manually trigger the processing (retry) of a previously recorded payment. Typically used to retry a failed payment after a customer updates their card.
Add or remove a person from an account.
Update a person's membership on an accou: Update a person's membership on an account — typically used to designate them as the primary contact.
Record a custom activity on an account,: Erfassen Sie eine benutzerdefinierte Aktivität auf einem Konto, einer Person oder einem Deal. Aktivitäten, die auf dem Aktivitätsfeed angezeigt werden und können Tropfkampagnen auslösen.
Subscribe a person to an email list, or: Subscribe a person to an email list, or unsubscribe them from it.
Send a confirmation email to the primary: Send a confirmation email to the primary contact of an account, a specific person, or all members.
Create a new support ticket (case) in Ou: Create a new support ticket (case) in Outseta.
Add a reply to an existing support ticke: Add a reply to an existing support ticket (case) in Outseta.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Einen benutzerdefinierten API-Aufruf an einen bestimmten Endpunkt machen
Name: Name
Title: Titel
Subject: Betreff
How to find the account to retrieve.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Accoun: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Account UID.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Primar: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Primary contact email. The action will resolve the email to the linked account.
How to find the person to retrieve.
Used when "Lookup by" is set to Email.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Person: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Person UID.
How to find the deal to retrieve.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Deal U: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Deal UID.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Contac: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Contact email + pipeline.
Used when "Lookup by" is set to Contact email + pipeline. Required in that mode.
How to find the subscription to retrieve: How to find the subscription to retrieve.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Subscr: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Subscription UID.
Used when \"Lookup by\" is set to Accoun: Used when "Lookup by" is set to Account UID. Resolves to the account's current subscription.
The UID of the account to retrieve the l: The UID of the account to retrieve the last payment for.
A custom identifier you assign to this a: Ein benutzerdefinierter Identifikator, den Sie diesem Konto zuweisen (z.B. Ihre interne Kunden-ID).
Notes that appear on invoices sent to th: Anmerkungen, die auf Rechnungen erscheinen, die an dieses Konto gesendet werden.
Optional. UID of an existing person to s: Optional. UID of an existing person to set as primary contact on the new account. Required by Outseta when starting a subscription with a paid plan.
Optional. If set, the account is created: Optional. If set, the account is created with an active subscription on this plan.
Used only when Starting Plan is set. Def: Used only when Starting Plan is set. Defaults to Monthly.
Custom properties defined on Account in: Custom properties defined on Account in your Outseta workspace. The widget for each field is automatically inferred from the property's ControlType (text, date, single-select, multi-select).
Email of the person to associate with th: Email of the person to associate with this deal.
UID of the account to associate with thi: UID of the account to associate with this deal.
Custom properties defined on Deal in you: Custom properties defined on Deal in your Outseta workspace. The widget for each field is automatically inferred from the property's ControlType (text, date, single-select, multi-select).
Email to search for. If no match is foun: E-Mail-Adresse, nach der gesucht werden soll. Wird keine Übereinstimmung gefunden, wird eine neue Person mit dieser E-Mail erstellt.
Custom properties defined on Person in y: Custom properties defined on Person in your Outseta workspace. The widget for each field is automatically inferred from the property's ControlType (text, date, single-select, multi-select).
Email of the contact associated with the: Email of the contact associated with the deal. Used to search for existing deals.
Pipeline stage for the deal (only requir: Pipeline stage for the deal (only required when creating a new one).
Name of the deal (used when creating a n: Name of the deal (used when creating a new deal).
UID of the account to associate with the: UID of the account to associate with the deal.
Client identifier of the person to assig: Client identifier of the person to assign the deal to.
The UID of the account to update.
The UID of the person to update.
The UID of the deal to update.
The client identifier of the team member: Die Kundenkennung des Teammitglieds, dem dieser Deal zugewiesen ist. Im Outseta Profil der Person gefunden.
The UID of the account to associate with: The UID of the account to associate with this deal.
UID of a person to add as a contact on t: UID of a person to add as a contact on this deal. Existing contacts are preserved.
The UID of the account to delete.
The UID of the person to delete.
The UID of the deal to delete.
Maximum number of accounts to return (de: Maximum number of accounts to return (default 100).
Page number to fetch (0 = first page, 1: Page number to fetch (0 = first page, 1 = second page, ...). Outseta uses page-based pagination, not record-based.
Maximum number of persons to return (def: Maximum number of persons to return (default 100).
Maximum number of deals to return (defau: Maximum number of deals to return (default 100).
Maximum number of plans to return (defau: Maximum number of plans to return (default 100).
Maximum number of add-ons to return (def: Maximum number of add-ons to return (default 100).
Maximum number of discounts to return (d: Maximum number of discounts to return (default 100).
Optional. Only return cases submitted by: Optional. Only return cases submitted by this person.
Optional. Only return cases submitted by the person with this email.
Maximum number of cases to return (defau: Maximum number of cases to return (default 100).
The UID of the account to retrieve trans: The UID of the account to retrieve transactions for.
Maximum number of transactions to return: Maximum number of transactions to return (default 100).
The UID of the account whose plan to cha: The UID of the account whose plan to change.
The UID of the account whose subscriptio: The UID of the account whose subscription to cancel.
If checked, the subscription is cancelle: Wenn aktiviert, wird das Abonnement sofort abgebrochen. Andernfalls läuft es am Ende des aktuellen Abrechnungszeitraums ab.
The UID of the account whose cancellatio: The UID of the account whose cancellation should be removed.
The UID of the account whose subscriptio: The UID of the account whose subscription will receive the discount.
Select the discount coupon to apply.
The UID of the account to record usage f: The UID of the account to record usage for.
The date of usage. Defaults to now if no: Das Datum der Nutzung. Standardwert ist jetzt, wenn nicht angegeben.
The UID of the account whose subscriptio: The UID of the account whose subscription will receive the add-on.
Number of add-on units to attach. Defaul: Number of add-on units to attach. Defaults to 1.
How often the add-on is billed. Defaults: How often the add-on is billed. Defaults to Monthly.
The UID of the account whose trial to ex: The UID of the account whose trial to extend.
The new date when the trial should end. Must be in the future. Time-of-day is ignored — Outseta uses date only (yyyy-MM-dd).
The UID of the account to update payment: The UID of the account to update payment information for.
The customer ID issued by the payment pr: The customer ID issued by the payment processor (e.g. Stripe customer ID, "cust_…").
The payment method ID issued by the paym: The payment method ID issued by the payment processor (e.g. Stripe payment method, "pm_…").
Cardholder name as it appears on the car: Cardholder name as it appears on the card.
The public code customers enter to redee: The public code customers enter to redeem the discount (e.g. "RENTREE2026").
Required when Duration is set to Repeati: Required when Duration is set to Repeating. Ignored otherwise.
Fixed amount discount (in your account c: Fixed amount discount (in your account currency). Set this OR Percent Off, not both.
Percentage discount (0-100). Set this OR: Percentage discount (0-100). Set this OR Amount Off, not both.
Maximum number of times the coupon can b: Maximum number of times the coupon can be redeemed across all customers.
The UID of the account to invoice.
Description for the invoice line item.
Amount for the invoice line item.
The UID of the account that owns the inv: The UID of the account that owns the invoice.
The UID of the invoice to apply the paym: The UID of the invoice to apply the payment to.
Payment amount as a negative number (e.g: Payment amount as a negative number (e.g. -49.00), as required by the Outseta API.
The UID of the invoice whose email shoul: The UID of the invoice whose email should be sent.
The UID of the payment to process. You c: The UID of the payment to process. You can get it from a 'Subscription Payment Declined' webhook payload, or from the 'List Account Transactions' / 'Get Last Payment for Account' actions.
The UID of the person to add or remove.
Only used when adding: whether this pers: Only used when adding: whether this person should be the primary contact for the account.
The UID of the person whose membership t: The UID of the person whose membership to update.
Whether this person should be the primar: Ob diese Person der Hauptkontakt für das Konto sein soll.
The activity title. Must match the start: Der Aktivitätstitel. Muss mit dem Start/Stop-Wert in Drip-Kampagnen übereinstimmen, wenn er für die Automatisierung verwendet wird.
Select the account, person, or deal to r: Wählen Sie das Konto, Person oder Deal, um die Aktivität aufzuzeichnen.
Optional string to store serialized JSON: Optionaler String, um serialisierte JSON oder andere Metadaten mit dieser Aktivität zu speichern.
The email address to subscribe or unsubs: The email address to subscribe or unsubscribe.
Only used when subscribing. If checked,: Only used when subscribing. If checked, Outseta will send the list welcome email.
Leave empty for primary contact, or use: Leave empty for primary contact, or use * for all members.
The UID of the person submitting the tic: The UID of the person submitting the ticket.
The source channel of the ticket.
Whether to send an auto-responder email: Whether to send an auto-responder email to the person.
The UID of the support ticket to reply t: The UID of the support ticket to reply to.
Name of the agent sending the reply.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Autorisierungs-Header werden automatisch von Ihrer Verbindung injiziert.

Triggers on account-scoped events (lifec: Triggers on account-scoped events (lifecycle, stage, billing, subscription, invoice).
Triggers on person-scoped events (lifecy: Triggers on person-scoped events (lifecycle, login, email engagement, list, segment, support ticket).
Triggers on deal-scoped events (lifecycl: Triggers on deal-scoped events (lifecycle, contact/account association).
Triggers on task lifecycle events (creat: Triggers on task lifecycle events (created, updated).
Triggers when a billing plan is created: Triggers when a billing plan is created or updated in the Outseta catalog.
Triggers when an add-on is created or up: Triggers when an add-on is created or updated in the Outseta catalog.
\n- In Outseta, go to **Settings → Notif:
- In Outseta, go to **Settings → Notifications → Add Notification**.
- Select the account event and paste the webhook URL in the callback field:
  ```text
  {{webhookUrl}}
  ```
- Create one notification per event, all pointing to this same URL.
Select one or more account-scoped events: Select one or more account-scoped events to listen for. Configure a matching Outseta notification for each, all pointing to this webhook URL.

- Create one notification per event, all pointing to this same URL.
Select one or more person-scoped events: Select one or more person-scoped events to listen for. Configure a matching Outseta notification for each, all pointing to this webhook URL.
